summary: Good soundboard capture of the MSG opening night featuring a lovingly‑performed first set and standout moments like Cold Rain & Snow, Queen Jane and Eternity.
review: The recording (a soundboard source) is praised as clear and free of noticeable flaws. Reviewers love this opening show of the six‑night Madison Square Garden run, highlighting a beautifully played Queen Jane, soaring Cold Rain & Snow, Althea, Eternity and the fresh additions Way To Go Home and Days Between. The second set mixes greatest‑hits with those new tunes, keeping the flow energetic and satisfying.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it rates the show highly (4/5) and mentions no recording problems, suggesting a good‑to‑great performance captured on a clean soundboard.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific complaints; reviewers imply the audio is clear and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is praised for its warm, rain‑soaked vibe and strong performances; the second set blends classic hits with new material (Way To Go Home, Days Between) for an engaging, varied show.
